---
title: "The Very Rev. Marsham Argles"
---

## The Very Rev. Marsham Argles

**Dates:** (1814-1892)

### Description

Rector of Barnack, Northamptonshire, and Dean of Peterborough.

### Biography

He married (24 October 1839)  (Margaret) Julia Davys (b.1816/7-1898), whom CMY had known from childhood. [LG Argles of Sibson]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 26th 1899
- Letter from June 5th [1872] [[footnote:1]]
- Letter from July 12th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
